name: Ichimoku TK Cross Cloud-Confirmed CCI Gate
edge_hypothesis: Ichimoku Tenkan-Sen (ITS_9) and Kijun-Sen (IKS_26) encode multi-timeframe momentum through midpoint calculations of high-low ranges — fundamentally different from EMA which only tracks close prices. A TK cross captures the relationship between 9-bar and 26-bar structural midpoints, making it a richer signal than simple MA crossovers. When price is ABOVE the Ichimoku cloud (both Senkou Spans), multi-layered trend structure is confirmed. Adding CCI > 0 ensures momentum is positive at entry. The hypothesis: Ichimoku's structural trend detection combined with CCI momentum gating produces higher-quality entries than single-MA + oscillator combos because it reads market STRUCTURE, not just price level. This is the first Ichimoku test in the system — it targets ranging-to-trending transitions where TK crosses fire as structure resolves.

variants.name: ichi_tk_cci_v1_8to1
variants.description: Core thesis: Ichimoku TK cross above cloud + CCI positive momentum gate. 8:1 R:R. TK cross is the entry trigger, cloud position confirms structural trend, CCI > 0 filters noise.

components.notes: Ichimoku Tenkan-Sen (9-bar midpoint of high-low range). Fast structural line — cross above Kijun triggers entry.
Ichimoku Kijun-Sen (26-bar midpoint). Slow structural line — TK cross captures multi-period momentum shift.
Senkou Span A — cloud boundary. Price above both spans confirms structural trend.
Senkou Span B — cloud boundary. Cloud position acts as multi-layered regime filter.
CCI momentum gate. > 0 for long, < 0 for short. Filters entries where momentum hasn't aligned.
ATR-based position sizing and R:R framework.

variants.name: ichi_tk_cci_v2_strong_8to1
variants.description: Stronger CCI gate: CCI > 50 for long / CCI < -50 for short. Tests whether requiring established (not just nascent) momentum improves win rate at the cost of fewer entries. If structural TK cross + strong momentum produces higher PF, the extra filter pays for reduced frequency.

components.notes: Stronger CCI gate at +/-50. Tests established momentum vs nascent.

variants.name: ichi_tk_pure_v3_8to1
variants.description: No CCI gate — pure Ichimoku structural entry. TK cross above cloud only. Tests whether Ichimoku's multi-layered structure is self-sufficient without momentum confirmation. If PF is comparable to v1, the CCI gate adds complexity without edge.

components.notes: Cloud Span A — structural trend confirmation.
Cloud Span B — structural trend confirmation.

indicator_roles.baseline: ITS_9/IKS_26 — Ichimoku structural midpoint lines. TK cross captures multi-period momentum shift. ISA_9/ISB_26 cloud confirms structural trend regime.
indicator_roles.confirmation: CCI_20_0.015 — momentum direction gate. Ensures statistical momentum aligns with structural signal.
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — position sizing and R:R framework.
